notes:
v2.6.57 — Institutional signal quality: 3-touch minimum, dynamic TP, MA20 timing

- Minimum 3 trendline touches required (was 2) — eliminates weak fake TLs
- TP now targets nearest swing high/low instead of fixed 2R
- Fallback to 2R when no swing level found at 1R+ distance
- New MA20 pullback score: +8 pts when price recently tested MA20 before breakout
- All existing users automatically migrated to new TP mode on first launch
